title: The Marmozet
content:
The species Man and Marmozet
    Are intimately linked;
    The Marmozet survives as yet,
    But Men are all extinct.
meaning:
"The Marmozet" is a quintessential example of Hilaire Belloc's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
